title: rubus koehleri var. flaviramus
intro: Rubus koehleri var. flaviramus, also known as the Yellow-fruited Raspberry or Korean Red Raspberry, is a variant of the Rubus koehleri species, a type of bramble or thorny shrub native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which are believed to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits associated with consuming Rubus koehleri var. flaviramus include its potential to boost the immune system, protect against cardiovascular disease, and exhibit anti-aging properties. Rubus koehleri var. flaviramus is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed fresh or dried, or used topically to promote skin health and wound healing.
